segments.caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a modern, high-tech stage illuminated with vibrant green neon lines and a large audience in the background. The stage features a central performance area with a grand piano, and four red judge chairs are positioned on a raised platform to the right, each with a large speaker and a red button. The on-screen text 'CUATRO SILLAS' appears, indicating the 'Four Chairs' blind audition phase. A male performer, identified by on-screen text as 'LINUS NEHRIG' performing 'Kiss Me', is seated at the piano, singing passionately into a microphone. The camera cuts to close-ups of the judges: a male judge in a black suit with a white shirt and a beard, a male judge with blonde hair in a black leather jacket with gold trim and a necklace, a female judge with long blonde hair in a shiny silver suit, and a male judge with long dark hair in a black V-neck shirt. The judges are initially turned away, listening intently. As the performance progresses, the female judge in the black leather jacket presses her red button and turns her chair, followed by the male judge in the black suit, who also turns with a smile. The camera captures close-ups of the performer’s hands on the piano keys and his focused expression. The stage lighting remains predominantly green and dark, creating a moody atmosphere. The performance continues with the judges reacting—some leaning forward, others smiling. The camera pans across the stage, showing the audience’s engagement. The segment ends with a dramatic close-up of the performer singing, followed by a black screen with the word 'BLOCKED' in bold red letters, indicating a judge has blocked another’s choice.
